news-korea-econ.title: Iran is gambling that Trump will cave. It hasn’t gone well for them so far
news-korea-econ.description: Tehran's ruling system still does not believe President Donald Trump is prepared to go beyond pressure and dismantle the Islamic Republic of Iran.

news-global-econ.title: Unions that paralyzed New York commute over pay spent millions on luxury travel, filings show
news-global-econ.description: LIRR strike union leaders spent over $3 million on luxury lodging and dining in 2025 while arguing workers couldn't make ends meet, records show.

news-global-econ.title: Fmr Dem Rep Barney Frank, sharp-tongued liberal trailblazer, Dodd-Frank co-author dies
news-global-econ.description: Barney Frank, the liberal Massachusetts congressman behind the Dodd-Frank financial reform law and a gay rights pioneer, has died at age 86.

news-global-econ.title: India’s treasury-bill yields surge on rate-hike expectation
news-global-econ.description: Yield on the 364-day treasury bill rose 21 basis points to 5.9750% Wednesday, the most in nearly four years, according to data compiled by Bloomberg

news-global-econ.title: Cargo theft hits everything from LEGO to tequila. We need the Senate to help stop it
news-global-econ.description: A $1 million LEGO heist in the Mojave Desert illustrates why Congress must pass CORCA to combat organized cargo theft costing Americans billions.

news-global-econ.description:
We cannot allow Americans to be at the mercy of Chinese hackers. That’s why Congress must pass the Strengthening Cyber Resilience Against State-Sponsored Threats Act.

news-korea-soc.title: Mace targets Squad Dem with proposed constitutional ban on foreign-born lawmakers
news-korea-soc.description: Rep. Nancy Mace proposes expanding the natural-born citizen requirement beyond the presidency to Congress, federal judges and cabinet appointees.

news-global-soc.title: 'Baywatch' star Brooks Nader's conservative parents banned bikinis growing up as she slips into red swimsuit
news-global-soc.description: Brooks Nader says her conservative parents approve of her "Baywatch" reboot role because the iconic red swimsuit is a one-piece, following family rules.

news-global-soc.title: New drug approach offers hope for patients with recurrent aggressive cancers
news-global-soc.description: Merck announces that sac-TMT, a new cancer drug, demonstrated strong results in phase 3 trials for advanced or recurrent endometrial cancer patients.

news-global-soc.title: Trump admin accuses Hamas of backing Gaza flotilla, sanctions activist and Muslim Brotherhood networks
news-global-soc.description: The Trump administration accuses Hamas of backing a Gaza flotilla and sanctions several organizers tied to the effort and related activist networks.

news-global-soc.title: Platner doesn’t want to wave the green flag with China, he prefers the white flag
news-global-soc.description: Progressive Maine Senate candidate Graham Platner advocates cooperating with China on clean energy, but that's naive about national security risks.
